title: [Moore] Mark wait_event with side-effect even if it is empty
body:
If an `always @(*)` procedure does not read any values, an empty wait_event is inserted by ImportVerilog. Retaining this is important because it means the procedure suspends indefinitely at that point.

Also, lower an empty wait_event directly to a 'halt' op because it's more efficient in simulation and code size, and makes no difference in behavior.
